text: in this video i'm going to show you a
simple scalping strategy that works
perfect for the one minute time frame it
uses a special indicator called the
williams fractals indicator and we're
going to combine it with some other
indicators to make it that much more
effective it's easy to use works in
almost all markets and most importantly
it works let's dive straight into it
first things first get on trading view
or whatever trading chart platform you
use right now i have my time frame set
to one minute but this strategy will
work for almost all time frames let's
add the williams fractals indicator
first to do that go to the indicators
tab type in williamsfractals and it's
going to be the one right here the
default settings will work perfect just
make sure the period is set to 2 and for
the colors it's originally red then
green but i flipped them to green than
red so it's easier to understand when
reading the chart next we're going to
add some moving averages go back to the
indicators tab and type in three moving
averages it should be this one by advent
trading once you have that added we're
going to change the settings a bit go up
to the settings of that indicator change
length 1 to 20 change length 2 to 50 and
length 3 to 100 then for simplicity sake
i'm going to change the colors of the
lines to green yellow and red in that
order now that we have the indicators
added let's go on to how the strategy
actually works the first rule of the
strategy is you can only go long if the
20-day the green line is above the 50
day the yellow line and the 50 day is
above the 100 day if they are crossing
each other like this then you should not
enter the trade it's the complete
opposite for a short trade so the 100
should be on the top the 50 in the
middle and the 20 on the bottom now that
we know how the moving averages should
look let's move on to know when to enter
into a trade to enter a long trade the
price has to pull back under the 20-day
moving average or under the 50-day
moving average then you also have to see
a williams fractal green arrow this will
be your entry signal let me show you an
example so you can better understand
what i'm talking about so first things
first we made sure the moving averages
are in the correct order and they are
not crossing each other then we wait for
the price to cross under the 20-day
moving average we keep waiting till the
williams fractal indicator gives us the
green arrow for the go-ahead to enter
the trade once it does we create a long
position put the stop loss right below
the 50-day and then have a 1.5 profit
ratio as you can see in this example the
strategy worked out perfect and we made
money if the price keeps moving down
before the williams fractal gives a
green arrow and crosses the 50-day then
gives a green arrow you're gonna do the
same thing and enter the trade here but
this time you're gonna add a stop loss
right below the hundred day and still
set a 1.5 ratio now there's a very
important rule you must follow for this
trading strategy to be profitable if the
price moves below the 100 day moving
average you do not enter a trade on the
green arrow from the williams fractal
indicator so as you can see here the
price moves below the hundred day then
the williams fractal gives a green arrow
and as you can see the price drops again
so if the price ever closes below the
hundred day just disregard the next
green arrow because the chance that
it'll drop even more is a lot higher now
let's take an example of a short trade
with the strategy first make sure all
the lines are in the correct order with
the hundred day on top and the 20 on
bottom then we wait for the price to
cross above the 20 day then wait for a
red arrow from the williams fractal
indicator once we get the signal we
enter the trade here add a stop loss
right above the 50 day and then set a
1.5 profit ratio you should also
understand that you have to trust this
strategy it may take some time before
the price hits your profit mark you have
to trust the strategy and stay in it as
an important note you should also
realize that you will get a ton of buy
signals especially if you're trading on
the one minute time frame if you are
it's extremely important you make sure
that your broker or exchange has very
low fees otherwise the fees will ruin
the gains because of the volume of
trades you're taking i just showed you a
winning strategy using moving averages
and williams fractal indicator all i ask
in return is if you take two seconds out
of your day and like this video if you
want to see one of my top favorite
strategies i use on a daily basis check
out this video and i'll see you guys
next time
[Music]
